title: Covenant Eyes vs Be Candid: An Honest Comparison
description: A fair, side-by-side comparison of Covenant Eyes and Be Candid — two fundamentally different approaches to accountability. See which one fits your situation.
author: Be Candid Team
content:
Two Philosophies of Accountability

Covenant Eyes and Be Candid both exist to help people build healthier digital habits. But they approach the problem from opposite directions.

Covenant Eyes believes accountability works through transparency — if your partner can see what you're doing online, you'll make better choices. Their system monitors your activity and shares it.

Be Candid believes accountability works through self-awareness — if you understand why you make certain choices, you'll develop the internal capacity to make different ones. Our system helps you reflect and share on your own terms.

Neither approach is universally right. The best tool depends on where you are in your journey, what kind of support you need, and how you want your accountability relationship to function.

Feature-by-Feature Comparison

CategoryCovenant EyesBe Candid
Core ApproachScreen monitoring + reportsSelf-reporting + AI insights
ScreenshotsYes — AI-analyzed screen capturesNone
VPN RequiredYesNo
Content FilteringYes — built-in web filterNo — focuses on behavior, not blocking
JournalingNot includedBuilt-in with AI insights
AI FeaturesScreen content analysisBehavioral pattern detection, trigger mapping, journaling insights
Therapist IntegrationNot availableSession prep briefs with granular permissions
Partner SharingFull browsing reports sent automaticallyYou choose exactly what to share
Desktop AppYes — monitoring agentYes — optional awareness nudges
Mobile AppiOS and AndroidiOS and Android
Battery ImpactSignificant (VPN + monitoring)Minimal
Pricing$16.99/monthFree during beta
Faith-Based FocusYes — Christian-orientedSecular — works for everyone

Where Covenant Eyes Excels

Credit where it's due. Covenant Eyes does several things well:

Comprehensive Web Filtering

If you want a tool that actively blocks access to certain categories of content, Covenant Eyes delivers. Their web filter is mature and well-maintained. Be Candid intentionally doesn't offer content blocking — we believe that addressing the root cause is more effective than building a higher wall. But if filtering is a requirement for your situation, CE has it.

Established Track Record

Covenant Eyes has been around since 2000. They have a large community, extensive support resources, and deep integrations with churches and recovery organizations. If you're part of a community that uses CE as a standard tool, there's value in the shared experience and infrastructure.

Parental Controls

For parents monitoring younger children's devices, Covenant Eyes' monitoring approach makes more sense. Children need external boundaries. Be Candid is designed for adults making voluntary choices about their own recovery.

Where Be Candid Excels

Privacy and Dignity

This is the fundamental differentiator. Be Candid never captures your screen, never monitors your browsing, and never sends reports you didn't choose to share. Your accountability partner sees what you decide to show them — nothing more. This creates a relationship built on trust and voluntary honesty, not surveillance.

Clinical-Grade Therapist Integration

Be Candid was designed with therapeutic use in mind. Therapists can receive AI-generated session prep briefs that summarize patterns and progress between appointments — with fine-grained permission controls that respect clinical boundaries. This means your therapist walks into each session already informed, without you spending the first 15 minutes catching them up.

Behavioral Intelligence

Rather than telling your partner what websites you visited, Be Candid's AI helps you understand why you're struggling. It identifies temporal patterns ("your hardest moments are Sunday nights"), emotional triggers ("stress at work precedes most lapses"), and behavioral chains that you might not notice on your own. This is actionable intelligence — not a shame report.

The Observer Effect

Be Candid's accountability model is based on a principle from physics: observation changes behavior. Simply knowing that someone cares about your progress — and that you'll be honest with them — creates a powerful internal motivation that doesn't require surveillance to maintain. Your partner's role shifts from "report reviewer" to "supportive ally."

No VPN, No Conflicts

Be Candid doesn't require a VPN, which means it works alongside work VPNs, doesn't drain your battery, and doesn't conflict with other network tools. For professionals and travelers, this alone can be a dealbreaker with VPN-dependent alternatives.

Common Scenarios: Which Tool Fits?

"I'm an adult managing my own recovery"

Be Candid. You need self-awareness tools and supportive accountability, not surveillance. The journaling, AI insights, and therapist integration are designed specifically for this journey.

"My spouse wants to see my browsing activity"

Consider both. If your spouse needs the reassurance of seeing browsing data, Covenant Eyes provides that. But if you're both willing to try a trust-based model, Be Candid's shared check-ins and streak tracking can build a healthier dynamic where accountability strengthens the relationship rather than creating a parent-child dynamic.

"I'm in a church recovery group"

Covenant Eyes may be better integrated. Many church programs are built around CE's reporting structure. That said, Be Candid works well alongside group recovery — the journaling and pattern insights add a layer of self-reflection that group programs sometimes lack.

"I want my therapist involved"

Be Candid. No other accountability tool offers built-in therapist integration with session prep briefs and granular data permissions designed for clinical use.

"I need parental controls for my kids"

Covenant Eyes (or a dedicated parental control tool). Be Candid is designed for voluntary adult accountability, not child monitoring.

Can You Use Both?

Yes. Some users run Covenant Eyes for filtering and monitoring while using Be Candid for journaling, self-reflection, and therapist integration. The tools address different dimensions of the same challenge — one manages your environment, the other helps you understand yourself.

Try Be Candid Free

Be Candid is free during beta. Use promo code CandidlyFree to unlock 3 months of Pro features including AI pattern detection, therapist integration, advanced insights, and the desktop awareness tool.

Create your account — no credit card, no VPN, no screenshots. Just honest accountability.
